summary: The plastic carriers sized 40-90 typically contain gutta-percha as their main component based on consistent medical research indicating this traditional filling method’s efficacy despite advancements in materials science. Key findings emphasize how gutta-percha fits perfectly into root canals through softening properties essential for proper adaptation within complex canal systems without being displaced by modern substitutes currently available. To directly address your query about what makes up those particular carrier sizes, they primarily consist of gutta-percha given historical precedence and current scientific validation supporting such practice over other options considered less reliable or effective under similar conditions encountered clinically when treating teeth requiring full-seal obturation procedures involving precise
